trending.title: New merger rules are no free ride for European champions, says Teresa Ribera
trending.body: The EU’s competition chief rejects consolidation-as-strategy argument ahead of next month’s unveiling of the revamped regulations.

trending.title: EU countries cool on Brussels age-check app
trending.body: The EU’s app to check the age of internet users faces resistance from national governments, according to a survey by POLITICO.

trending.title: ‘A deal is a deal,’ Trump’s ambassador tells EU
trending.body: Andrew Puzder tells POLITICO the bloc should implement the Turnberry trade agreement without major changes.

trending.title: Inside Ukraine’s robot war revolution
trending.body: A Ukrainian commander tells POLITICO how robotic systems are transforming the battlefield, in a development with the potential to reshape how wars are fought.

trending.title: The problem with Europe’s Big Tech breakup: It’s still hooked
trending.body: Thanks to Trump, EU governments are trying to break their overreliance on U.S. technology. It won’t be cheap or easy.

competition.title: New merger rules are no free ride for European champions, says Teresa Ribera
competition.body: The EU’s competition chief rejects consolidation-as-strategy argument ahead of next month’s unveiling of the revamped regulations.

privacy.title: EU countries cool on Brussels age-check app
privacy.body: The EU’s app to check the age of internet users faces resistance from national governments, according to a survey by POLITICO.

privacy.title: ‘A deal is a deal,’ Trump’s ambassador tells EU
privacy.body: Andrew Puzder tells POLITICO the bloc should implement the Turnberry trade agreement without major changes.

privacy.title: Inside Ukraine’s robot war revolution
privacy.body: A Ukrainian commander tells POLITICO how robotic systems are transforming the battlefield, in a development with the potential to reshape how wars are fought.

privacy.title: The problem with Europe’s Big Tech breakup: It’s still hooked
privacy.body: Thanks to Trump, EU governments are trying to break their overreliance on U.S. technology. It won’t be cheap or easy.

privacy.title: Don’t ‘overload’ US deal with extra demands, says EU trade boss
privacy.body: “A deal is a deal,” Maroš Šefčovič tells  POLITICO.

regulatory.title: EU legislators fail to clinch deal to delay AI law
regulatory.body: Talks derailed over request backed by Germany to weaken rules for manufacturing and medical devices.

regulatory.title: UK calls on ‘middle powers’ to counter over-concentration of AI control
regulatory.body: The technology secretary said Britain is making a “decisive move” towards backing its own startups.

regulatory.title: EU Commission: Blame Berlin and Paris for red tape, not us
regulatory.body: Brussels says national governments are making EU rules more burdensome than intended.

regulatory.title: Von der Leyen plays down deregulation clash with German conservatives
regulatory.body: Merz’s center-right bloc is using increasingly hardball tactics to get the European Commission president to slash red tape in Brussels.

regulatory.title: Europe craves its own superhacking AI
regulatory.body: European governments have struggled to gain access to new superhacking AI created in the U.S., so they want a European alternative.

regulatory.title: Brussels does Delaware: Von der Leyen chases startups, but unions see danger
regulatory.body: A new EU-wide company form is meant to stop fledgling firms fleeing to America. Trade unions say it would sacrifice the European social model. And experts say it might not work anyway.

regulatory.title: Head of UK data watchdog voluntarily steps aside amid HR probe
regulatory.body: Information Commissioner John Edwards stepped back from his duties on Feb. 26 in order “to enable an independent workplace investigation which relates to him,” the agency said.

regulatory.title: American soldier arrested over Polymarket wagers tied to Maduro’s capture
regulatory.body: The case highlights the swelling concern around the threat of insider trading on prediction market platforms like Polymarket.

regulatory.title: Intimate talks: Brussels ponders the naked body in AI bill
regulatory.body: Officials debate how to define “intimate parts” in a draft ban on AI nudification tech.

regulatory.title: EU majority resists French call to overhaul US trade deal
regulatory.body: Ahead of a second round of negotiations, Germany leads opposition to calls from Paris and EU lawmakers to add safeguards to the transatlantic trade accord.

regulatory.title: UK intelligence: 100 nations have spyware that can hack Britain
regulatory.body: Security officials will warn there is an increasing cyber threat from nation states at a conference in Glasgow on Wednesday.

regulatory.title: Germany faces resistance in push to weaken AI rules
regulatory.body: 10 countries warn push would ‘result in deregulation, not simplification.’

regulatory.title: EU top court strikes down Hungary’s anti-LGBTQ+ rules
regulatory.body: Viktor Orbán had banned mentions of homosexuality in media accessible to children and outlawed Pride marches.

regulatory.title: EU Commission jobs reshuffle on hold as chiefs stick in post
regulatory.body: The first serious round of movement in the upper ranks since Ursula von der Leyen took office was expected to follow a promotion in the competition department.

regulatory.title: Germany turns to Brazil as US ties fray
regulatory.body: The German chancellor’s push to strengthen relations and double trade with Brazil is part of a broader push to reduce reliance on the U.S. and China.

regulatory.title: White House meets with Anthropic CEO amid hopes for a truce
regulatory.body: The “introductory meeting” came as the Trump administration is considering how to deploy a groundbreaking new Anthropic model amid its feud with the leading AI company.

regulatory.title: Brussels launched an age checking app. Hackers say it takes 2 minutes to break it.
regulatory.body: Cyber experts say they have found holes in Brussels’ age verification app, despite claims by the EU executive that it is “technically ready.”
